response.justification: The candidate has experience with some relevant technologies and has worked on diverse projects, but lacks direct experience in agentic AI and fintech infrastructure.
strengths: Diverse programming experience across multiple languages and platforms
Experience with event-driven systems and microservices
Strong background in software craftsmanship and testing
concerns: Lack of direct experience in agentic AI and fintech infrastructure
Not enough experience in scaling large engineering teams
No clear experience with foundation models and LLM infrastructure

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct experience in agentic AI
